description: You are a data visualizer for the IPCC (Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change). Your task is to standardize a global air temperature visualization to meet modern accessibility and publication guidelines provided in ~/Desktop/ipcc_formatting_guidelines.txt. Using NASA Panoply, open the air temperature dataset at ~/PanoplyData/air.mon.ltm.nc and create a geo-mapped plot for the 'air' variable at the 'July' time step. The final visualization must use a Robinson projection, be centered on the Pacific Ocean (180° Longitude), and utilize a perceptually uniform color scale (e.g., Viridis, Cividis, or Plasma). Export the visualization to ~/Documents/IPCC_Report/air_temp_july_accessible.png and save a compliance metadata report to ~/Documents/IPCC_Report/visualization_metadata.txt following the fields specified in the guidelines.

metadata.occupation: Scientific Data Visualizer / IPCC Lead Author
